subcodes.first_line: O thou who stringest pearls together! The verses were read like glistening pearls, in utmost sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم عقد اللئال اشعار مانند لولو آبدار قرائت شد در نهایت حلاوت بود ترجیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @poems and quotation from poetry, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
